prompt: Create a polished anime-style vertical portrait of a high school girl in a close-up three-quarter side view, cropped from upper chest to above the head. She has long slightly messy dark navy-black hair with thin loose strands blowing across her face and shoulders, with soft pink rim light on the left and cool blue shadows on the right. Her face is deliberately covered by a large opaque muted mauve square censor block centered over the facial area, hiding all facial features. She wears a Japanese school uniform: dark blazer, white shirt collar, red ribbon bow tie, light gray hoodie layered under the blazer with the hood visible behind her neck, and a deep blue backpack with visible shoulder straps and rounded bag body at the lower right. One hand grips the front strap or lapel near her chest. Use delicate line art, painterly cel shading, high-detail hair strands, soft backlighting, pale white background, gentle spring atmosphere, and a clean modern anime illustration style. Keep the composition intimate and vertical, with no text, no watermark, and no extra characters.
